opening_hours: Check current venue-level access directly because the geopark covers multiple sites and programs.

description.en: A specialist geology-and-fossil route that gives Korat a distinct second identity beyond Khmer heritage and Khao Yai.
description.nl: Een specialistische geologie- en fossielenroute die Korat een duidelijke tweede identiteit geeft naast Khmer-erfgoed en Khao Yai.

metaDescription.en: Why Khorat Geopark is a worthwhile specialist detour from Korat if fossils and geology matter to the trip.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Khorat Geopark een waardevolle specialistische uitstap vanuit Korat is als fossielen en geologie belangrijk zijn voor de reis.

enhanced_description:
Khorat Geopark is the province's strongest specialist detour if your interest is geology, fossils, and paleontology rather than one more temple or market. The geopark's own current framing around UNESCO Global Geopark status, cuestas, and 'World Paleontopolis' makes clear that this is not generic filler.

It is also not compulsory for everyone. The geopark works best when it is chosen deliberately. For many first-timers, Phimai or Khao Yai should still come first. But if the fossil and geology side is the real reason for leaving the city, this is the route that gives Korat a distinctive second identity.
detailed_history: The Khorat UNESCO Global Geopark's current official site continues to frame the area through UNESCO Global Geopark status, paleontology, and the broader landscape identity of cuestas and fossil-rich terrain.
visitor_experience: Expect a theme-led detour rather than a single blockbuster stop. It rewards visitors who genuinely care about paleontology or geology more than visitors who just need another item on the list.

best_time_to_visit.duration: Half day or more depending on the route

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Best by car or driver, with the route planned in advance.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: Treat the geopark as the day's theme rather than combining it with too many other unrelated stops.
practical_info.food_options: Plan simple meals around the route instead of relying on spontaneous options.
practical_info.shopping: This is an interpretation and landscape route, not a retail stop.

insider_tips: Choose this only if the subject actually interests you.
Do not stack it onto a full Phimai or Khao Yai day.
Recheck current access and venue details before departure.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on the geopark's current official site.
cultural_significance: The geopark gives Korat a second serious provincial identity grounded in fossils, paleontology, and landscape interpretation.
